chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5844 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "كَلاَمٌ فِي حَقٍّ خَيْرٌ مِنْ سُكُوتٍ عَلَى بَاطِلٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5844 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Speaking the truth is better than remaining silent upon falsehood."
